chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Muslim Killing a Dhimmi, a Slave, a Mudabbar, or a Mukatab, or Them Killing a Muslim

text: 5254 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ اَلْمُغِيرَةِ عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ تَغْلِبَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "دِيَةُ اَلْيَهُودِيِّ وَ اَلنَّصْرَانِيِّ وَ اَلْمَجُوسِيِّ دِيَةُ اَلْمُسْلِمِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5254 - Abdullah ibn Al-Mughirah narrated from Mansur, from Aban ibn Taghlib, from Abu Abdullah (as) who said:
"The blood money (diyyah) for a Jew, a Christian, and a Magian is equal to that of a Muslim."
